meta.title: Oral Surgery Practice Software | Surgical Coordination & Referral Management | clinIQ
meta.description: Complete guide to oral surgery practice operations. Referral tracking. IV sedation coordination. Implant case management. High-volume surgical flow.

hero.subhead: Your referrals need systematic tracking. Your IV sedation cases need coordination. Your implant cases need management. clinIQ tracks referrals, coordinates sedation, and manages surgical workflows.

sections.content:
Oral surgery practices run high-volume surgical operations with significant referral relationships.

**The referral relationship:**

General dentists refer extractions, implants, wisdom teeth. Maintaining these relationships requires communication and tracking.

**The sedation coordination:**

IV sedation cases require pre-op evaluation, NPO instructions, escort arrangements, monitoring, and recovery.

**What clinIQ does:**

Referral source tracking: Which dentists refer? Volume by referrer.

Referral communication: Consult notes back to referring dentist.

Relationship management: Track referral patterns, identify opportunities.

IV sedation adds complexity to oral surgery cases.

**What clinIQ does:**

Pre-op checklist: Medical history, NPO instructions, escort confirmed.

Recovery tracking: Post-procedure monitoring documented.

Discharge criteria: Standard discharge criteria met before release.

Dental implant cases involve multiple stages.

**What clinIQ does:**

Case tracking: Consultation → planning → surgery → healing → restoration referral.

Imaging coordination: CBCT scheduling and review.

Restoration coordination: Communication with restorative dentist.

Oral surgery is high-volume.

**What clinIQ does:**

Room visibility: Which rooms available, occupied, turnover.

Provider queue: Who's ready for surgeon.

Case mix: Wisdom teeth vs implants vs extractions — different times.

**Week 1-2:** Referral tracking, sedation coordination, implant management configured.

**ROI:** Referral relationships strengthened. Efficiency gains.

**Investment:** Professional $499/month. Implementation $750 one-time.

faqs.a: Referral source per patient. Volume by referrer. Communication back to referrer.
Yes. Pre-op checklist, recovery tracking, discharge criteria.
